LanguageData.MSSFP_OrbEvent_VGE_GravdataCorruption_Te: An electromagnetic spike from {0}'s overworked solver during {1}'s descent corrupted every byte of gravdata collected on the trip. The black box was wiped clean.
LanguageData.MSSFP_OrbEvent_VGE_GravtechWindfall_Msg: {0} wrung extra gravdata out of {1}'s route — a tidy windfall stored in the black box.
